name: Rose Gold Hoop Earrings
description: Elegant rose gold hoops with a brushed finish. Perfect for everyday wear or special occasions. Lightweight and comfortable for all-day use.

name: Pearl Drop Earrings
description: Classic freshwater pearl drop earrings set in sterling silver. Timeless elegance that complements any outfit from casual to formal.

name: Crystal Stud Earrings
description: Sparkling crystal studs in a four-prong silver setting. Versatile and sophisticated, these studs add a touch of glamour to any look.

name: Gold Leaf Chandelier Earrings
description: Statement chandelier earrings featuring delicate gold leaf motifs. These eye-catching pieces are designed to turn heads at parties and weddings.

name: Turquoise Boho Dangles
description: Vibrant turquoise stone dangles in an antique silver setting. Bohemian charm meets modern style in these unique handcrafted pieces.

name: Diamond-Cut Huggie Hoops
description: Dainty huggie hoops with a diamond-cut texture that catches the light beautifully. Snug fit design makes them ideal for active lifestyles.

name: Ruby Heart Drop Earrings
description: Romantic heart-shaped ruby drops in a gold-plated setting. These lovingly crafted earrings make a perfect gift for anniversaries and Valentine's Day.

name: Minimalist Bar Studs
description: Clean, modern bar studs in brushed gold. A minimalist statement piece that pairs perfectly with everything from office wear to evening looks.

name: Emerald Green Teardrop Earrings
description: Luxurious emerald green stone teardrops with pavé crystal surround. Designed for the woman who commands attention at every event.

name: Twisted Silver Hoop Earrings
description: Contemporary twisted hoop design in sterling silver. The unique rope-like texture adds dimension and interest to a classic silhouette.

name: Floral Cluster Stud Earrings
description: Delicate floral cluster studs with tiny cubic zirconia petals. Feminine and sweet, these earrings add a whimsical touch to spring and summer outfits.

name: Black Onyx Statement Earrings
description: Bold black onyx statement earrings in a geometric gold setting. These dramatic pieces are designed for confident women who love bold accessories.
